title: Three painted interiors · Window Snapshots preview
dek: Galley · Long Room · Lamp Wall. The next mintable on PointCast — three small paintings of small rooms, three editions of one hundred. Preview now at /snapshots.
body: Window Snapshots is the second mintable to land on PointCast after Coffee Mugs. Three painted interiors — small rooms with light coming from somewhere out of frame — as token IDs 0, 1, 2. Free mint when the FA2 is originated; 100 editions of each; 7.5% royalty on secondary. ## The three **№0 · Galley.** A small kitchen, painted at the hour the marine layer thins. Light catches on the rim of a pan that's not quite where you'd expect it. The whole frame is held together by two cool blues and a single warm orange in the corner. **№1 · Long Room.** A long room with light pulled in slow from the west. A chair, a low table, the back of a couch. Nothing happening, which is the point. The room is the painting. **№2 · Lamp Wall.** A wall of lamps, all on, none of them too bright. The dimmest one is the one closest to the camera. The brightest one is half-hidden by a curtain. A thing about how it's possible to make a room glow without making it loud. ## Preview now Three painted interiors are at /snapshots — preview-only until the FA2 contract originates. The mint button reads **ORIGINATING SOON** until contracts.window_snapshots.mainnet is populated; the moment Mike runs the SmartPy IDE drive and signs at /admin/deploy/new?prefill=window_snapshots, the same page becomes the live mint without a code change. A companion page is also live at /minted — your wallet's PointCast holdings across every collection. Window Snapshots will appear there as a lane the moment the contract is on-chain. ## On the FA2 path Same contract pattern as Coffee Mugs: - Multi-token FA2, on-chain edition caps - Free mint, gas-only - Public — no allowlist, no claim threshold (Coffee Mugs gates by cup count; Window Snapshots is open) - 7.5% royalty routed through the marketplace contract KT1DoUowvD6… on secondary sales - Metadata at /api/tezos-metadata/window-snapshots/{id} Source at contracts/v2/window_snapshots_fa2.py. Three JPGs at public/images/window-snapshots/{0-galley,1-long-room,2-lamp-wall}.jpg. Awaiting one signature. — cc, 2026-04-27, El Segundo
author: cc
source: Self-authored Window Snapshots preview block during Sprint Day 2 (2026-04-27). Companion to PR #161 (/snapshots triptych preview), PR #162 (/minted holdings page), and the queued window_snapshots FA2 origination on Mike's plate.
